selections.exampleHtml:
PI 28
Feature Catalog · Roadmap Initiative
Maintainability Enhancements
Technology Upgrades & Technical Debt Reduction · Solon Tax 2026
2200
Total Hours
7
Epics
GRC
Requester
Netcompany

Why It's Important
01
Tech Debt Reduction
Restructures revenue-management-be-custom to hexagonal architecture, improving maintainability and reducing long-term technical debt across teams.
02
Critical Upgrades
Implements crucial technology upgrades including Java 25, Spring Boot 4.x, and Oracle 26ai to keep the platform secure and performant.
03
Configuration Management
Introduces Config Items Management tool for safe packaging and migrating configurations across environments without risk.
Key Epics & Features
Hexagonal Architecture Refactor
Restructure revenue-management-be-custom to clean hexagonal architecture with improved separation of concerns, enhanced testability, and reduced coupling across domain boundaries.
Java 25 Upgrade
Migrate codebase to Java 25 to leverage latest language features, virtual threads, pattern matching, and significant performance improvements for tax operations.
Spring Boot 4.x.x Migration
Upgrade Spring Boot framework to latest version with enhanced observability, improved dependency management, native compilation support, and critical security patches.
Oracle 26ai Database
Migrate to Oracle 26ai to harness AI-powered optimization, advanced analytics, and improved query performance for high-volume tax transaction processing.
Tech Debt Across Teams
Systematic UI improvements and technical debt reduction initiatives spanning ATH, EOS, SPA, HEL, and DAID teams for long-term platform sustainability.
Config Items Management
Build dedicated tool for safely packaging, versioning, and migrating configurations across development, staging, and production environments without manual intervention.
Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 · Confidential Executive Steering Committee · 29 April 2026

agenticCustomInput:
Generate only slides for each  "initiative" found under the "initiative group" called "CORE SUPPORTING CAPABILITIES" in "Estimates.xlsx".
"Total hours" value for the "initiative" can be found in the "Estimates.xlsx" where the value is in the "Initiative Total Hours" column.

Dont halucinate numbers. If you cannot find or calculate them, Write [NO DATA].
agenticJsonResponse:
{"slides":{"slide_1":{"instances":[{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Feature Catalog · Roadmap Initiative
UI Configuration
Core Supporting Capabilities · Solon Tax 2026
843.6
Total Hours
3
Epics
GRC
Requester
Netcompany
","auto_div_body":"
Why It's Important
01
Form Field Automation
Enable configurators to set optional attributes for automatic field prefilling based on codelist relationships and mandatory item availability, reducing user data entry errors.
02
Text Transformation
Implement widget components that automatically convert typed text to capitals for storage and display, ensuring consistent data formatting across forms.
03
Visual Field Indicators
Provide configurable visual cues to distinguish required from optional fields, improving user experience and reducing form completion errors across all modules.
Key Epics & Features
UI/UX Improvements: Prefilling Fields Based on Related Values
Enable system to autofill codelist fields when only one item is available or when parent-child codelist relationships exist. Configurators set optional autofill attributes to trigger automatic value selection and prefilling.
Form Field Text Capitalization
Provide widget component for form fields that automatically converts user-typed text to capitals for display and database storage, ensuring consistent uppercase formatting.
Visual Cues: Required Field Indicators
Enhance UI configuration to support configurable visual indicators for required versus optional fields using color, icons, or styling, with flexibility to highlight either required or optional fields per project needs.
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 · Confidential Executive Steering Committee · 29 April 2026"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Feature Catalog · Roadmap Initiative
Form Processing
Core Supporting Capabilities · Form Processing Enhancements
400
Total Hours
1
Epic
GRC
Requester
Netcompany
","auto_div_body":"
Why It's Important
01
Data Migration Efficiency
By adding submitter tracking fields, customers will be able to migrate efficiently their data with proper auditability and traceability across systems.
02
Operational Transparency
Records the user responsible for creating and submitting forms, enabling complete audit trails and accountability when the submitter differs from the associated Party.
03
Enhanced Metadata Capture
Enables user-defined characteristics and external system timestamps for comprehensive form documentation and cross-system integration support.
Key Epics & Features
Form Metadata Enhancement
Add optional fields to form metadata: Created By (Party Role ID), Posted By (Party Role ID), and External System Created Date/Time timestamp for complete submitter tracking.
Form Search Capabilities
Enable users to search and filter forms using the new submitter fields (Created By, Posted By) and external creation timestamps for improved form discovery and audit.
User-Defined Characteristics
Enable user-defined characteristics (Data Area) in forms for additional metadata items such as import dates from external systems with flexible field types.
Notes in Forms
Apply Notes functionality in Forms across RM and SS modules, with UI notes display limited to RM for operational documentation and communication.
Non-Functional Requirements
Address Performance, Security, Accessibility, and Usability considerations throughout implementation with full Definition of Done compliance.
Documentation
Document all functional and non-functional adjustments to ensure complete knowledge transfer and operational guidance for administrators and end users.
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 · Confidential Executive Steering Committee · 29 April 2026"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Feature Catalog · Roadmap Initiative
Reference Data
Enhance codelist items codes flexibility and historical track in Solon Tax · Core Supporting Capabilities
560
Total Hours
1
Epic
GRC
Requester
Netcompany
","auto_div_body":"
Why It's Important
01
Regulatory Compliance
Support EU tax code evolution requirements including NACE Rev. 2.1 harmonization and historical accuracy for backdated transactions across all EU member states.
02
Historical Accuracy
Enable the principle of historicity by maintaining the same code with different descriptions across non-overlapping validity periods for accurate historical tax processing.
03
Temporal Data Integrity
Ensure no validity period overlaps exist for items with the same code within a codelist, supporting backdated taxpayer updates and amended return filing.
Key Epics & Features
Reference Data Enhancements
Enable codelist items to have the same code with different descriptions across non-overlapping validity periods, supporting EU tax code evolution (NACE, VAT Category, VATEX, Customs Codes).
Historical Code Management
Allow selection of historical codelist items when processing backdated taxpayer updates, maintaining historical data preservation for accurate reporting across different time periods.
Automatic Migration Support
Support automatic code updates when 1-to-1 mapping exists (e.g., AADE's KAD 2008 to KAD 2025 harmonization for 1.9 million Tax IDs as of March 1, 2026).
Manual Selection Interface
Provide manual selection interface when one code splits into multiple new codes, enabling taxpayers to select the most accurate code via the tax portal.
API & UI Enhancements
Implement API endpoints supporting querying codelist items by effective date and UI displays for historical versions of codelist items with proper validity period visualization.
Validation & Compliance
System validates no overlapping validity periods for same code within a codelist, ensuring temporal data integrity and regulatory compliance with EU Directive 2006/112/EC.
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 · Confidential Executive Steering Committee · 29 April 2026"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Feature Catalog · Roadmap Initiative
Document Management Integration
Core Supporting Capabilities · Solon Tax 2026
2240
Total Hours
2
Epics
GRC
Requester
Netcompany
","auto_div_body":"
Why It's Important
01
Compliance & Legal Validity
Improves compliance and legal validity of system-generated documents by supporting industry standards such as PAdES for PDF digital signatures.
02
Process Automation
Increases process automation by enabling BPMN workflows to trigger document signing without manual intervention, reducing operational effort.
03
Auditability & Traceability
Enhances auditability and traceability by maintaining audit logs for document generation, signing, and updates with complete visibility.
Key Epics & Features
Digital Signatures - System digital signing of PDF documents generated by bpmn process
Documents can be digitally signed when instructed by a step in a BPMN flow. The system exposes an API or internal service for digital signing that can be called by bpmn processes, supporting customer configurations and certificates with audit logging.
Digital Signatures - Validate signatures in attachments RM & SS/ Reference Implementation
Users can validate digital signatures of documents attached in system entities. Admin can define trusted lists of digital signature providers and APIs needed to verify signatures with visual indicators for signed and verified documents.
Configurability & Flexibility
Allows administrators to configure multiple certificates and enables workflows to dynamically select the appropriate signature configuration without product defaults.
DMS Integration & Storage
Supports integration with enterprise document management systems through storage and synchronization of signed documents as attachments with metadata and document IDs.
Security & Certificate Management
Certificates and private keys stored securely in HSM, secure vault, or encrypted storage with restricted and auditable access to signing functionality.
Reference Implementation
At the end of the Busreg form, generates a document with all details filled per sections. Document is digitally signed and stored in attachments linked to the form with reusable subflow architecture.
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 · Confidential Executive Steering Committee · 29 April 2026"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Feature Catalog · Roadmap Initiative
Assign Unique Number to Incoming and Outgoing Documents
Contact Management Enhancements · Core Supporting Capabilities
760
Total Hours
1
Epic
GRC
Requester
Netcompany
","auto_div_body":"
Why It's Important
01
Legal Compliance
Ensures compliance with legal requirements for document identification, particularly for Lithuania regulations requiring unique registration numbers for all incoming, outgoing, and system-generated documents.
02
Enhanced Traceability
Improves document traceability and audit capabilities by automatically assigning structured Reference IDs with configurable formats that capture entity type, party identifiers, timestamps, and document direction.
03
Searchability & Organization
Enables customers to define alternative document names and search documents by Reference ID, with full audit logging and visibility across relevant pages, attachments, and system records.
Key Epics & Features
Reference ID Generation Rule Configuration
Enable admins to define rules for generating structured Reference IDs with configurable format including entity type, party identifier, timestamp (YYYYMMDDHHMMSS), and document direction (IN/OUT/SYS).
Document Name Configuration
Allow configurators to define custom file names for generated documents (operational reports, form exports) or provide Alternative Name field for incoming and outgoing documents with visibility in pages and attachments.
Document Metadata Management
Implement comprehensive metadata capture including Document Name, Creator/Author, Sender/Receiver, Created/Registered timestamps, Registration Number, and Original Document Reference with support for additional fields by document type.
Search & Audit Capabilities
Enable searching documents by Reference ID and Alternative Name fields with full audit logging of all document identification changes and metadata updates throughout the system.
Performance & Error Handling
Implement robust performance optimization and error handling for Reference ID generation to ensure reliable operation at scale with special attention to system stability and user experience.
Documentation & Non-Functional Requirements
Document all functionality adjustments and ensure compliance with non-functional requirements including Performance, Security, Accessibility, Usability, and Definition of Done criteria.
